Title: Relates to monopoly and anti-trust whistleblower incentives and protections
Summary: Relates to monopoly and anti-trust whistleblower incentives and protections including receipt of a portion of monetary sanctions for original information provided.
LawCode: Add §344, Gen Bus L; amd §4, St Fin L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, the state finance law and the executive law, in relation to monopoly and anti-trust whistleblower incentives and protections
